title: PLAY GROUPS AND CLASSES - 211info
text: GROWING TOGETHER FAMILY COMMUNITY CENTER PLAY GROUPS AND CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of early childhood education and play groups for children. Also offers classes for adult parenting skills. 310 SW H Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Varies by class. Most classes are for children ages 0-5 and their caregivers. Hours: Varies by class Email (541) 864-0776 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 864-0776 Main phone Call or text Main phone (541) 864-0776 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties Services: Children's Play Groups Exercise Classes/Groups * Children Exercise Classes/Groups * Infants/Toddlers Parent Support Groups Parenting Skills Classes * Children Parenting Skills Classes * Infants/Toddlers Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - EMERGENCY DIAPER CLOSET If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
